title: Is verilator capable of accessing memory content using VPI interface?

features.name: unpacked array memory with verilator public vpi attribute
features.description: Code should include a 1D unpacked array (memory) with verilator public_flat_rd attribute for VPI access

features.name: vpi_handle_by_name access to memory array
features.description: Code should include vpi_handle_by_name call attempting to access a memory array in the design hierarchy
